org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gxl.readers

Class AbstractGXLReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLReader
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gxl.readers.AbstractGXLReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GXLConstants, NetEditorReader, XMLConstants
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GXLReader1, GXLReader2

    public abstract class AbstractGXLReader
extends AbstractXMLReader
implements GXLConstants
    This abstract class permits to read a graph-model from the GXL format.

    GXL (Graph eXchange Language) is designed to be a standard exchange format for graphs. GXL is an XML sublanguage and the syntax is given by a XML DTD (Document Type Definition). This exchange format offers an adaptable and flexible means to support interoperability between graph-based tools.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://www.gupro.de/GXL/"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • createGXLReader

        public static AbstractGXLReader createGXLReader(String version)
        Create a GXL reader that is corresponding to the given NetEditor/GXL specification version.
        Parameters:
        version - is the NetEditor/GXL specification version
        Returns:
        the reader.

        public final NetEditorContentType getContentType()
        Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.

        the type, or null if unknown.

      • extractAttributes

        protected Map<String,Object> extractAttributes(Element node,
                                   Progression progression)
                                        throws IOException
        Extract the attributes from the specified node.
        Specified by:
        extractAttributes in class AbstractXMLReader
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore.
        progression - is the progression indicator to be used to notify about the progression of the extraction.
        Returns:
        the extracted attributes.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractType

        protected String extractType(Element node)
                      throws IOException
        Extract the type of the specified node as a string.
        Specified by:
        extractType in class AbstractXMLToolReader
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore
        Returns:
        the type of the node, never null.

        IOException

      • extractInternalType

        protected static String extractInternalType(Element node)
                                     throws IOException
        Extract the type of the specified node as a string, assuming that it is an internal type of NetEditor.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore
        Returns:
        the type of the node, or null.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • isFigureModel

        protected static boolean isFigureModel(Element node)
                                throws IOException
        Replies if the specified node is the node for a graph model.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to test.
        Returns:
        true if the specified node contains a graph model; otherwise false.
        Throws:
        IOException
